mapper.sql: select id, order_no, user_id, order_status, pay_status, total_amount, pay_amount, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, pay_time, cancel_time, ship_time, finish_time, create_time, update_time from orders
mapper.update:
update orders
order_status = #{toStatus},
pay_status = #{payStatus},
pay_time = sysdate(),
cancel_time = sysdate(),
ship_time = sysdate(),
finish_time = sysdate(),
update_time = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and order_status = #{fromStatus}

update orders set order_status = '2', cancel_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where order_status = '0' and pay_status = '0' and create_time <= DATE_SUB(now(), interval #{timeoutMinutes} minute) limit #{limit}
mapper.select: select count(*) from orders where date(create_time) = curdate()

select date_format(t.dayDate, '%m-%d') as dayLabel, t.orderCount as orderCount, t.paidAmount as paidAmount from ( select date(create_time) as dayDate, count(*) as orderCount, ifnull(sum(case when pay_status = '1' then pay_amount else 0 end), 0) as paidAmount from orders where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} day) group by date(create_time) ) t order by t.dayDate asc
select order_status as status, count(*) as total from orders group by order_status order by order_status
select pay_channel as channel, count(*) as total from order_payment where pay_status = '1' group by pay_channel order by total desc
